name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling causes project delays. We provide a system that schedules and tracks daily equipment inspections instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling and tracking of daily equipment inspections leading to potential project delays.
features: simple reporting dashboard for inspection history
